questions.question: Which article of the Indian Constitution relates RTI to the fundamental right to freedom of speech and expression?
Which of the following subjects was moved from the State List to the Concurrent List by the 42ⁿᵈ Amendment Act?
The reservation of seats in Panchayats for SCs/STs and women comes under which Article?
Who has the power to give directions to the State Government to ensure compliance with Union laws?
What is the maximum strength of members in a State Legislative Assembly as per the Constitution of India?
The 44ᵗʰ Amendment (1978) removed which of the following from the list of Fundamental Rights, converting it into a mere legal right under Article 300A?
Who were members of the States Reorganisation Commission formed in 1953?
questions.option_3: HN Kunzru, KM Panikkar, Fazl Ali

questions.question: What is the term of office for the President of India?
Which of the following Acts provides legal status to Lok Adalats in India?
The Directive Principles of State Policy aim to establish:
The All India Services in India are created under which Article of the Constitution?
The Supreme Court’s doctrine of 'Basic Structure' (the Parliament CANNOT alter the basic features of the Constitution) was first established in which landmark case?
questions.option_1: Minerva Mills vs Union of India (1980)
questions.option_2: IC Golaknath vs State of Punjab (1967)
questions.option_3: Shankari Prasad vs Union of India (1951)
questions.option_4: Kesavananda Bharati vs State of Kerala (1973)

questions.question: In which year were the Indian Civil Service (ICS) and Indian Police (IP) replaced by the Indian Administrative Service (IAS) and Indian Police Service (IPS), later recognised as All-India Services?
Which body recommends the distribution of tax revenue between the Centre and States?
Which Constitutional Amendment Act restored the Parliament's power to amend Fundamental Rights?
Women play a significant role in rural livelihoods and household management. What is the minimum percentage of seats reserved for women in Panchayati Raj Institutions?
Which Article empowers the High Courts to issue writs for the enforcement of Legal and Fundamental Rights?
Which Article of the Constitution mandates the establishment of the National Commission for Scheduled Castes?
Which law provides for reservation in education and employment to Economically Weaker Sections (EWS)?
Which Constitutional Amendment granted constitutional status to the Panchayati Raj system in India?
Which of the following Directive Principles of State Policy is stated under Article 48A of the Indian Constitution?
questions.option_3: Protection and improvement of the environment

questions.question: What is the tenure of a Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) member?
questions.option_1: 4 years or till they attain the age of 60 years
questions.option_3: 6 years or till they attain the age of 65 years
questions.option_4: 5 years or till they attain the age of 65 years

questions.question: Which of the following was a key feature of Article 370 that granted special status to Jammu and Kashmir before its abrogation in 2019?
questions.option_1: Jammu and Kashmir had no representation in the Lok Sabha.
questions.option_2: The provisions of the Directive Principles of State Policy were fully enforceable in the state.
questions.option_3: Parliament needed the state government's concurrence to legislate on Union List matters for Jammu and Kashmir.
questions.option_4: Jammu and Kashmir could not be included in the First Schedule of the Constitution.

questions.question: Which of the following statements is correct regarding the legislative allocation of co-operative societies in the Constitution of India?
questions.option_1: It is a subject in the Union List.
questions.option_2: It falls under the Residuary (Union) List.
questions.option_3: It is a subject in the State List.
questions.option_4: It is a subject in the Concurrent List.

questions.question: Which Constitutional Amendment introduced the Goods and Services Tax (GST) in India?
questions.option_1: One Hundred and Second Amendment Act, 2018
questions.option_2: One Hundred and First Amendment Act, 2016
